news.headline: Nasdaq extends HUB Cyber Security’s bid price compliance deadline to April 14, 2025, following review of developments.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on March 14, 2025, HUB Cyber Security Ltd. (NASDAQ: HUBC) disclosed that they have been granted a 14-day extension by the Nasdaq Hearings Panel to demonstrate adherence to the minimum bid price rule. The company has until April 14, 2025, to attain 10 sequential trading days with a minimum share price of $1. HUB is a leading global entity in confidential computing and advanced secured data fabric technology.

news.headline: Heidmar expands services to include commercial management for offshore sector, secures 5-year contract for PSV in North Sea.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, Heidmar Maritime Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: HMR) revealed its new venture into commercial management services for the offshore sector, expanding its service portfolio. The company secured a client for a five-year contract where it will provide a platform supply vessel (PSV) along with a crew for supply tours in the North Sea. Additionally, the contract includes three optional one-year extensions for continued services.

news.headline: CAVA opens first restaurant in Fishers, IN with 40-seat dining room, 3,000 sq.ft location open 10:45am-10pm, serves Mediterranean-inspired dishes.
news.summary: In Washington, CAVA, a Mediterranean fast-casual restaurant brand traded on NYSE under CAVA, has launched their inaugural restaurant in the Indianapolis metropolitan area. Situated at 11594 Whistle Drive, Suite 150, Fishers, IN 46037, the restaurant's operating hours are from 10:45 a.m. until 10:00 p.m. Covering a 3,000-square-foot area, CAVA Fishers accommodates 40 diners and features digital order pick-up and delivery services. The menu highlights Mediterranean-style bowls, pitas, dips, and dressings, offering a flavorful dining experience.

news.headline: Williams-Sonoma to release Q4 results on March 19th, 2025 before market open. Conference call set for 10:00 AM ET. Replay available at 12:00 PM ET.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Williams-Sonoma, Inc. (WSM) will unveil its fourth quarter figures on March 19, 2025, before markets open. The Company will hold a conference call at 10:00 AM Eastern Time accessible at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events post the wire service announcement. A replay of the webcast will be accessible at http://ir.williams-sonomainc.com/events from 12:00 PM onwards.

news.headline: Trump's tariffs may raise new car prices by $4,000+. Used cars could also see a price hike. Consumers facing a tough situation.
news.summary: One estimate suggests that the prices of new cars could jump by $4,000 or higher, potentially leading to a surge in the cost of used cars as well. An expert described the scenario as chaotic for consumers.

news.headline: Shiba Inu's burn rate jumps 27,735% in 24 hrs. Speculation of bullish reversal, as key metrics improve. SHIB at $0.00001246, $7.3B market cap.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (SHIB) is experiencing a significant increase in its burn rate, sparking rumors of a bullish turnaround as important technical and on-chain indicators show improvement. The current price of SHIB stands at $0.00001246 with a market capitalization of $7.3 billion. Over the last 24 hours, SHIB has seen a 2% increase, meanwhile, over a 7-day period, it has dropped by 7.3%. In comparison, Dogecoin (DOGE) is priced at $0.1694 with a market cap of $25.1 billion, experiencing a 0.07% decrease in the last 24 hours and a 16.5% decrease over 7 days. Pepe (PEPE) stands at $0.056973 with a market cap of $2.9 billion, showing a 0.9% drop in a day and a 1.5% decrease over the week. Analysts at Rose Premium Signals highlight that SHIB is currently challenging the upper resistance of a falling wedge on the 4-hour chart. They suggest that a breakout above the 50-day moving average is necessary to confirm an upward trend, with potential price targets at $0.00001305, $0.00001375, $0.00001485, and $0.00001565 if this shift occurs. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Large shareholder criticizes James River Group Board for discretionary performance bonuses. Gregory & Scott Fortunoff (affiliates) own significant equity in JRVR (NASDAQ). Sent letter to Board.
news.summary: Gregory and Scott Fortunoff, along with their affiliates, have a significant equity stake in James River Group Holdings, Ltd. (NASDAQ: JRVR). They have recently addressed a letter to the Company's Board of Directors expressing their concerns regarding the Board's recent decisions.

news.headline: CoolIT Systems presents liquid cooling tech at NVIDIA GTC 2025, including highest-density CDUs. Leader in computing cooling.
news.summary: A company based in Calgary, Alberta, CoolIT Systems, known for its liquid cooling solutions for computers, will present its newest technologies at NVIDIA GTC 2025. The showcase will include their advanced coolant distribution units (CDUs) with the highest density. CoolIT is recognized as a global leader in liquid cooling technology.

news.headline: $1B funding secured by Visionary (NASDAQ: GV) for battery swapping layout in Hong Kong, capitalizing on EV market growth.
news.summary: In March 14, 2025, Visionary (NASDAQ: GV) achieved a noteworthy milestone in the advancement of battery swapping technology for new energy vehicles in Hong Kong. This development has sparked considerable interest from investors, with a $1 billion financing secured for the company's new energy vehicle initiatives.

news.headline: AGCO to attend BofA Securities Global Industrials Conference 2025 in Duluth, GA on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: A company known as AGCO, a prominent player in the agricultural machinery and precision technology industry, revealed its involvement in the BofA Securities Global Industrials Conference 2025, happening on Tuesday. AGCO, traded on the NYSE under the ticker symbol AGCO, is recognized worldwide for its innovative designs, manufacturing excellence, and wide-reaching distribution of agricultural equipment. This event signifies AGCO's commitment to engagement in global industrial conversations and networking opportunities.

news.headline: Got Electric LLC partners with Urbana High School Booster Club for a matching donation campaign benefiting the community.
news.summary: In Ijamsville, Maryland on March 14, 2025, Got Electric LLC, a reputable provider of residential and commercial electrical services, has announced a new initiative to further support the Urbana and Ijamsville community. They are initiating a matching donation campaign to aid the Urbana High School Athletic program. This campaign aims to match contributions made by community members to the program. This effort showcases their dedication to supporting local initiatives and enhancing the community's access to sporting opportunities.

news.headline: Seadronix raises $11.3M in Series B to expand autonomous navigation solutions globally, targeting compliance with maritime regulations.
news.summary: Seadronix, a company based in Seoul, South Korea, announced on March 14, 2025, its plans to improve ship AI and robotics technologies. Their goal is to increase the adoption of autonomous navigation solutions worldwide, aiming to set the standard for autonomous navigation while complying with global maritime regulations. This initiative is set to revolutionize the industry by implementing cutting-edge technology and ensuring safety at sea.

news.headline: FanDuel introduces unique product features for March Basketball: combine picks from rounds into a parlay and Bet Back Token.
news.summary: Newly introduced enhancements from FanDuel, the leading online gaming company in North America, comprise a unique feature allowing users to combine selections from various tournament rounds into a single parlay and the launch of a Bet Back Promotional Token. The company unveiled these industry-first features on March 14, 2025, emphasizing their commitment to innovation within the gaming sector.

news.headline: StudyFetch launches AI video tool for studying, generates up to 1hr explainer videos. Enhances AI usability for students. Los Angeles, March 14, 2025.
news.summary: A cutting-edge product has been launched that enables the creation of explainer videos lasting up to 1 hour. This development marks a substantial breakthrough in the practical application of AI for students and educators. Released by StudyFetch, a prominent AI-driven platform for academic institutions, this innovation enhances the real-world functionality of AI in education. It allows for the generation of lengthy educational videos, empowering users with advanced learning tools. Los Angeles was the hub of this launch on March 14, 2025, underscoring the platform's commitment to advancing education through technology.

news.headline: Vera Whole Health and Anthem open fifth advanced primary care center in Atlanta area's East Point, improving access.
news.summary: A new advanced primary care center is set to open in East Point, Atlanta, marking Vera Whole Health's fifth facility in the area. The collaboration with Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Georgia underscores a commitment to improving healthcare access. Scheduled to open on March 14, 2025, the center will cater to a growing population in the region, providing comprehensive care services. This move is part of a strategic effort to address healthcare needs, with the goal of benefiting a significant number of residents in the Atlanta area.

news.headline: Pinkberry introduces new fruity and floral frozen yogurt and smoothie nationwide, available for a limited time starting on March 14, 2025.
news.summary: As of March 14, 2025, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Pinkberry® has introduced a fresh twist on frozen yogurt with a new flavor innovation, accessible at select stores across the country for a limited period. Customers can now enjoy this latest addition to Pinkberry's menu, offering a unique experience for the spring season.

news.headline: MicroAlgo Inc. enhances Grover Quantum Search Algorithm, boosting stability & practicality by optimizing quantum circuit, cutting qubits.
news.summary: In Shenzhen, China on March 14, 2025, MicroAlgo Inc. revealed advancements in their algorithm. The company, listed as MicroAlgo on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MLGO, disclosed that their research and development specialists have enhanced the algorithm's stability and usability. This was achieved through optimizations in the quantum circuit design, resulting in a reduction in the number of qubits required for operation.

news.headline: Florbetaben (18F) Injection Neuraceq to launch at St. Teresa's Hospital in Hong Kong in March 2025, enhancing Alzheimer's diagnosis.
news.summary: Cutting-edge Imaging Solution to Improve Alzheimer's Disease Detection and Patient Care in Boston AreaOn March 14, 2025, Life Molecular Imaging (LMI) and St. Teresa's Hospital revealed a collaboration to introduce Florbetaben (18F) Injection, known as Neuraceq®, which will revolutionize Alzheimer's disease diagnosis and patient treatment in the region. This innovative imaging solution promises to significantly enhance the accuracy of detecting Alzheimer's and improve overall patient care.

news.headline: "China.org.cn reports on the "cloud-borne school bus" service helping nine children from Nizhuhe Village overcome a 550-meter rise for access to education."
news.summary: In a recent report on the "cloud-borne school bus" service in China, it was highlighted that nine children from Nizhuhe Village encounter a daily challenge navigating the 550-meter ascent from the valley floor to the mountaintop in the Nizhu River Grand Canyon. This service has been implemented to assist these children in reaching school safely.

news.headline: Luxury Collection partners with MAD Academy for culinary sustainability, aiming to integrate eco-friendly practices globally.
news.summary: A partnership between MAD Academy and a prominent luxury hospitality brand has been established with a primary focus on promoting sustainable practices. The collaboration aims to incorporate these principles into culinary offerings within The Luxury Collection's worldwide portfolio. This initiative, which commenced on March 14, 2025, underscores a commitment to education and environmental consciousness.

news.headline: Worldline North America receives 'Great Place to Work' for 4th year in a row. Certification based on independent evaluation.
news.summary: Victoria, British Columbia - On March 14, 2025, Worldline [Euronext: WLN], a prominent player in payment services worldwide, proudly shares news of their recognition as a Great Place To Work® for the fourth consecutive year. The acknowledgement comes after a thorough evaluation conducted independently by the Great Place to Work organization.

news.headline: Roswell kitchen remodeling expert DConceptHomes rebrands as DC Renovation and Remodeling, emphasizing decades of expertise.
news.summary: DC Renovation and Remodeling, previously recognized as DConceptHomes, has unveiled their new branding to emphasize their dedication to skilled workmanship, top-notch home renovations, and unparalleled client contentment in the Roswell and Atlanta regions. The announcement was made in Roswell, Georgia on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Saga Origins partners with GFAL to bring AI agents to Diamond Dreams game, enhancing gameplay experience.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Saga Origins, the publishing division of Saga Protocol that supports game developers, is teaming up with web3 gaming startup GFAL (Games for a Living) to incorporate AI-powered agents into Diamond Dreams, a forthcoming 3D match-3 puzzle game. Under this partnership, GFAL will solely leverage Saga's chainlets and resources to boost in-game processes and animate smart, adaptive characters, ushering in a fresh phase of interactive gaming.

news.headline: Valarie Sheppard named interim CFO of Ibotta, replacing Sunit Patel who is leaving for telecom opportunity. - Denver business.
news.summary: Denver-based Ibotta, Inc. revealed that Valarie Sheppard, an experienced professional and existing board member of the company, will step into the role of interim Chief Financial Officer ("CFO"). This move comes as the current CFO, Sunit Patel, departs Ibotta to explore a new opportunity in the telecommunications sector. Ibotta, known for operating the largest digital promotions network in North America, trades under the symbol IBTA on the NYSE. Valarie Sheppard's appointment as interim CFO is effective immediately.

news.headline: Semtech reveals plans for investor conference in the near future.
news.summary: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.1%. This improvement is attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs in the last month. The manufacturing sector saw the most growth, adding 50,000 new positions, while the service industry also contributed with 80,000 new jobs. The report indicates a positive trend in the job market, with more people finding employment opportunities. Additionally, the data shows that the average hourly wage has increased by 3.5% compared to last year, providing further hope for economic recovery.

news.headline: VeeMost Tech (OTC: $GDVM) announces E-Rate wins, new partnerships, and contracts with a government services provider in the defense sector.
news.summary: Red Bank, NJ - On March 14, 2025, VeeMost Technologies Inc. (OTC: $GDVM) shared positive news regarding its recent accomplishments in the IT and cybersecurity fields. The company highlighted multiple significant achievements showcasing its dedication to expansion and advancement.

news.headline: Sega's 'Code of Joker' game franchise resurrected on Sui Network, with 'Code of Joker: Evolutions' launching this year.
news.summary: A new game titled Code of Joker: Evolutions, which is affiliated with a Sega franchise, is scheduled to be released in Sui later this year through collaborations between Jokers Inc. and Mysten Labs’ Parasol.

news.headline: Lifeway Foods reports record-breaking 2024 results with $186.8 million net sales, 17% growth YoY, and $9.0 million net income. Company achieves 21st consecutive quarter of growth with strong demand for probiotic products. Increases production capacity in Waukesha plant to boost growth further in 2025. Adjusted EBITDA expected to reach $45-$50 million by FY2027.
news.summary: Leading U.S. probiotic supplier Lifeway Foods, Inc. reported a record-breaking 2024 with net sales of $186.8 million, up 17% from the previous year. This marked their 21st consecutive quarter of year-over-year growth. The company attributes this success to growing consumer interest in probiotic foods. The CEO highlighted the continued popularity of their flagship product, Lifeway Kefir, as a driving force behind their strong performance. Additionally, the company is investing in a state-of-the-art facility in Wisconsin to increase production capacity and efficiency. Lifeway's goal is to achieve an Adjusted EBITDA of $45 - $50 million by FY2027. The press release contains forward-looking statements and detailed financial results for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024. The company's investor relations webcast provides further insights into their performance and future outlook.

news.headline: Rumble introduces Rumble Live, a linear live streaming lineup, ensuring viewers seamless day-long content. #RumbleLive
news.summary: In Longboat Key, Florida, on March 14, 2025, Rumble (NASDAQ:RUM) launched Rumble Live, a linear livestreaming service featuring creator content covering news, commentary, and entertainment throughout the day. This service eliminates the need to switch between different platforms for content consumption. Rumble Live utilizes Rumble Raiding technology to smoothly transition viewers from one show to the next, creating a seamless viewing experience. Each show will also be available on the creators' individual Rumble channels.

news.headline: Multicorp International, Inc. receives confirmation of foreign currency acceptance by the bank from 40 Brightwater LLC.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Agoura Hills, California, Multicorp International, Inc. (OTC Markets PINK: MCIC) received confirmation through an attorney's letter that its client's bank has accepted foreign currency from 40 Brightwater LLC.

news.headline: Interparfums extends partnership with Coach in fragrances till June 2031. Interparfums owns 72% of Coach.
news.summary: Interparfums, Inc. revealed on March 14, 2025, that its majority-owned subsidiary, Interparfums SA, released a statement. Interparfums, Inc. owns 72% of Interparfums SA's equity. The former is listed on the NASDAQ GS under the ticker symbol IPAR.

news.headline: Helios Technologies (HLIO) has made over 28 consecutive dividend payments.
news.summary: For more than 28 years, Helios Technologies (NYSE: HLIO) has maintained a remarkable record of consecutive dividend payments. The company, headquartered in Sarasota, Florida, has consistently distributed dividends to its shareholders without interruption for over two decades. This demonstrates the company's commitment to providing value to its investors and emphasizes its stability and financial strength.

news.headline: TEN Ltd. to release Q4 and 2024 year-end results on March 27, 2025 before market opens in New York.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, in Athens, Greece, TEN Ltd. ("TEN"), a prominent crude, product, and LNG tanker operator, disclosed its plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company, listed on the NYSE as "TEN," will make this announcement before the opening of the market in New York on Thursday, March 27, 2025.

news.headline: BioSurfaces and Morphocell Technologies partner to explore Bio-Spun™ material's therapeutic applications.
news.summary: In a recent collaboration, BioSurfaces, a prominent figure in advanced nanofiber materials, and Morphocell Technologies, a leading regenerative medicine firm, have teamed up to investigate the capabilities of BioSurfaces' exclusive Bio-Spun™ material. This partnership aims to leverage the unique properties of Bio-Spun™ for potential applications in the field of regenerative medicine. The venture between the two companies signifies a strategic move in the pursuit of innovative solutions, with BioSurfaces' cutting-edge material at the forefront. This joint initiative marks a significant step in the realm of advanced materials, potentially offering groundbreaking opportunities in the regenerative medicine sector.

news.headline: Blaize partners with Turbo Federal to accelerate AI solutions for US DoD; aim is to implement AI tech for federal use.
news.summary: Blaize Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:BZAI), a leading provider of AI-enabled edge computing solutions, based in El Dorado Hills, California, has revealed a significant partnership with Turbo Federal. Turbo Federal is a reputable provider of AI transformation services catering to various federal government agencies such as the Department of Justice (DoJ), Department of Defense (DoD), Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA), and Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI). The collaboration aims to assist Blaize in establishing connections within the federal sector, as well as identifying and implementing Blaize's advanced AI technology in federal use cases. This strategic move is geared towards supporting the adoption and testing of Blaize's innovative solutions within federal agencies.

news.headline: Battelle's DART wins top spot in DARPA Triage Challenge, excelling in identifying key injuries quickly.
news.summary: Battelle, based in Columbus, Ohio, emerged as the winner in a competition organized by DARPA focusing on advanced technologies for emergency responders. The key to victory in the DARPA Triage Challenge Event 1 was the rapid and precise identification of critical physiological indicators of injury-like hemorrhage and airway injuries. Battelle's innovative system, known as DART, claimed the first position in the Systems Competition, showcasing its effectiveness. Another group from Battelle, named CRI, also participated in the competition.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia QSR market projected to reach $16.62 billion by 2033 from $9.23 billion in 2024, with a CAGR of 6.78%.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Saudi Arabia Quick Service Restaurants market has been published, projecting significant growth. The market is anticipated to expand from US$ 9.23 billion in 2024 to US$ 16.62 billion by 2033, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.78% from 2025 to 2033. Factors attributed to this growth include changing customer preferences, the rise of the middle class, increased digitization, a thriving tourism sector, and a heightened focus on health consciousness.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.33% March 13 vs 4.33% March 12.
SharkNinja named Technology Company of the Year by Mass Technology Leadership Council in Needham, Massachusetts.
news.summary: A technology company based in Needham, Massachusetts, SharkNinja, was recently honored as the Technology Company of the Year by the Massachusetts Technology Leadership Council. This recognition highlights SharkNinja's achievements and contributions to the technology industry. The company's innovative work in the field has earned them this prestigious title, showcasing their dedication to excellence in the sector. The award signifies SharkNinja's significant impact and success, solidifying their position as a standout player in the technology landscape.

news.headline: French company discloses total voting rights and shares capital as of Feb 28, 2025. Capital: 106,862,404.20 euros. RCS Paris registration: 632 012 100.
news.summary: A French publicly traded company incorporated with a registered capital of €106,862,404.20, has its registered office located at 14 Rue Royale, 75008 Paris. The company is registered under the RCS Paris with the identifier 632 012 100 and possesses the Legal Entity Identifier 529900JI1GG6F7RKVI53.

news.headline: Hong Kong fintech sector experiences 250% growth in blockchain since 2022, with 1,100+ companies. Revenue set to hit $606B by 2032. Talent shortage and capital access are key concerns. Government policies boosting growth. China's "one country, two systems" policy benefiting innovation. HKMA's "Fintech 2025" strategy aims to establish financial hub status by 2025.
news.summary: Hong Kong's fintech ecosystem is thriving, with 1,100 fintech companies in the region, including 175 blockchain firms and 111 digital asset companies, showing significant growth since 2022. The sector is projected to reach a revenue of US$606 billion by 2032, with an annual growth rate of 28.5% from 2024 to 2032. Talent shortage (58.8%) and access to capital (43.9%) are top concerns. Over 73% of surveyed companies focus on AI, surpassing those in digital assets and cryptocurrencies. Hong Kong benefits from China's policy, boosting its Web3 innovations like licensing regimes and stablecoin initiatives. The HKMA aims to establish itself as a financial hub by 2025 through fintech integration, digital currency adoption, talent development, and supportive policies.

news.headline: Science Applications International Corp will report Q4 results on March 17. Earnings expected at $2.09/share and revenue of $1.81 billion. Shares closed at $104.26.
news.summary: Before the market opens on March 17, Science Applications International Corporation (NASDAQ:SAIC) is set to release its fourth-quarter financial results. Analysts predict the Virginia-based company will post quarterly earnings of $2.09 per share, a notable increase from $1.43 per share in the same period last year. The company anticipates quarterly revenue to reach $1.81 billion, compared to $1.74 billion from the previous year. In a recent development, Science Applications International partnered with Defense Unicorns to enhance the delivery of secure and scalable software capabilities for the Department of Defense. The company's shares closed at $104.26 with a 0.4% decline on Thursday. For additional details and analyst ratings, readers can refer to the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

news.headline: Stamford Health and Oula collaborate for midwife-led maternity and gynecology care in Connecticut.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut on March 14, 2025, Stamford Health and Oula have announced a partnership to enhance maternity care services in the state. This collaboration integrates Oula's holistic midwife-led techniques for prenatal, birthing, and postnatal care with Stamford Health's renowned healthcare expertise. The initiative aims to provide state-of-the-art maternity services by leveraging Oula's holistic approach and Stamford Health's established reputation in the field.

news.headline: NYSE releases daily pre-market update for March 14, 2025, providing market insights before trading starts. Alison Kosik presents.
news.summary: On March 14, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) released its daily pre-market update through PRNewswire. This update includes valuable market insights from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors are encouraged to review the NYSE Pre-market update today before starting their trading activities. Alison Kosik presented the pre-market update on this date.

news.headline: Germany's Scholz: We are ready to free €3b for Ukraine when package passes.
Dreame unveils AI-driven robotic pool cleaners in NYC event on March 14, 2025, expanding smart home innovation.
news.summary: Dreame Technology is venturing into the pool care sector with advanced cleaning solutions powered by artificial intelligence. The company, known for its groundbreaking home products, recently organized a special event at The Peninsula Hotel NYC to showcase its latest offerings. The event, attended by editors and influencers, highlighted Dreame's commitment to revolutionizing the smart home industry with high-performance solutions. The date of the event was March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Dollar General beats Q4 sales expectations, with 4.5% growth to $10.304 billion. Plans to close 96 Dollar General stores and 45 pOpshelf stores. CEO mentions improved execution.
news.summary: Dollar General Corporation (NYSE:DG) exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter sales, reporting a 4.5% year-on-year increase to $10.304 billion, surpassing the anticipated $10.264 billion. However, the EPS of $0.87 fell short of the projected $1.51. CEO Todd Vasos expressed satisfaction with the fourth-quarter business performance, citing enhanced execution and strong top-line outcomes. During the quarter, the company conducted a store portfolio evaluation, leading to the decision to shut down 96 Dollar General stores and 45 pOpshelf stores. Additionally, six pOpshelf stores will be converted to Dollar General stores.

news.headline: U.S. Gold Corp. will attend the 37th Annual ROTH Conference for Growth Companies in California. Nasdaq: USAU.
news.summary: U.S. Gold Corp., trading on the Nasdaq as USAU, will participate in the 37th Annual ROTH Conference for Growth Companies in Cheyenne, Wyoming on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Trump administration plans to increase Bitcoin reserves; aims for substantial accumulation in cost-neutral strategy. Key figures like Michael Saylor involved.
news.summary: A high-ranking representative from the White House revealed this week to leaders in the cryptocurrency industry that the Trump administration is looking to increase its Bitcoin holdings as part of a broader financial plan. Bo Hines, who leads the Presidential Working Group on Digital Assets, disclosed during a private meeting organized by the Bitcoin Policy Institute that the government aims to acquire a significant amount of Bitcoin. The meeting, which took place after a public event titled "Bitcoin for America," was attended by prominent figures in the sector, including Michael Saylor from Strategy (NASDAQ: MSTR), Fred Thiel from Marathon Digital (NASDAQ: MARA), Nathan McCauley from Anchorage Digital, and David Bailey from Bitcoin Magazine.

news.headline: German Conservatives' Merz: I expect vote to do these constitution amendments on Tuesday.
